phaseA_tghAdmin.summary: TelaranaGatewayHubHook post-deploy admin landed on chain. setGatewayRoute + setGatewayContextProofMode. EXECUTOR_ROLE was already granted at construction (initialAdmin gets DEFAULT_ADMIN+OPERATIONS+EXECUTOR).

txs.note: already granted at construction; hasRole(EXECUTOR_ROLE, keeper) verified true via eth_call

phaseB_v4PoolInit.summary: Uniswap v4 PoolManager.initialize for USDC/EURC pool with FxSwapHook attached.

phaseC_liquiditySeed.summary: FxSwapHook PMM liquidity seeded via owner-gated first deposit. Hot-reserve set to 100% (no Morpho rehypothecation) because USDC/EURC market params aren't wired through this hook yet.

phaseD_demoBroadcasts.summary: Live USDC↔EURC swap through FxSwapHook.beforeSwap NOT broadcast. Three pre-flight blockers documented below; none can be unblocked without follow-up work outside the Wave M4 brief.

blockers.name: V4_SWAP_TEST_ROUTER not deployed (Wave M3 unmerged)
blockers.detail: PoolManager.unlock(bytes) re-enters IUnlockCallback(msg.sender).unlockCallback(data). EOAs cannot satisfy this interface. Wave M3 must deploy a PoolSwapTest-equivalent on Arc Testnet — a contract that forwards (poolKey, swapParams, hookData) into PoolManager.swap from inside its unlockCallback.
blockers.fix: Deploy a router contract that satisfies IUnlockCallback and exposes a single unlock(bytes) external (canonical PoolSwapTest shape). Update CONTRACTS[5042002].bento.poolSwapTest (or equivalent) in @bufi/contracts.

blockers.name: FxOracle.getMid(USDC,EURC) reverts StalePrice() (0x19abf40e)
blockers.detail: FxOracle has the Pyth EUR/USD feed wired (PYTH_FEED_IDS.eurUsd=0x76fa85158bf14ede77087fe3ae472f66213f6ea2f5b411cb2de472794990fa5c). No fresh price has been pushed during the M4 window so getMid reverts. FxSwapHook.beforeSwap calls ORACLE.getMid directly — a swap would revert before consuming reserves.
blockers.fix: Either: (a) wrap each demo swap with an FxOracle.getMidWithUpdatePyth(...) call inside the same v4 router contract — requires the router to accept Hermes update blobs from the offchain caller; OR (b) run a cron (apps/keeper-gateway-signer or a sibling) that posts Pyth updates on Arc on an interval that beats the stale-price window.

blockers.name: Circle Gateway attestation env not provisioned
blockers.detail: Demo B (Gateway) additionally needs V4_SWAP_GATEWAY_ATTESTATION + V4_SWAP_GATEWAY_SIGNATURE. apps/keeper-gateway-signer is the source for these (signs Circle Gateway BurnIntent → POSTs to https://gateway-api-testnet.circle.com/v1/burnIntents → captures attestation + signature) but no live attestation was minted during the M4 window.
blockers.fix: Run apps/keeper-gateway-signer once with the keeper EOA against a Gateway Wallet deposit on Fuji. Capture the attestation + signature into env. The CLI is ready in fx-telarana — pending operator action.

encodingReference.purpose: Documents the exact calldata shape the demo scripts encode against, so M3 can verify its router contract matches this shape.

swapParams.amountSpecifiedNote: Negative = exact-input in v4 semantics; FxSwapHook.beforeSwap reverts on positive amountSpecified.
